acceptance_gates_before_llm_spend.requirement: model-visible edge signal contains no truth, correctness, reward, or target raw assay stats
edge signal varies across readout genes within most selected panels
edge-level signal beats the panel-card AUROC directionally before LLM spend
include shuffled readout-gene signal with matched style and missing truth labels
report as method-development until a scored LLM pilot separates real signal from placebo

candidate_signal_routes.main_risk: Nearest neighbors may encode experimental similarity without being calibrated reliability evidence.
candidate_signal_routes.model_dependency: scFoundation panel/cell embeddings plus same-readout-gene neighbor retrieval
candidate_signal_routes.name: scfoundation_neighbor_edge_support
candidate_signal_routes.why_it_matches_the_task: It varies by readout gene within a panel, so it can support edge-level verify/trust decisions.

candidate_signal_routes.main_risk: The current official smoke path only proved embeddings, not gene prediction output.
candidate_signal_routes.model_dependency: scFoundation must expose a gene-level prediction or reconstruction path
candidate_signal_routes.name: masked_readout_gene_prediction_delta
candidate_signal_routes.why_it_matches_the_task: It is directly aligned to the readout gene.

candidate_signal_routes.main_risk: Attribution can be unstable and easy for the LLM to overinterpret.
candidate_signal_routes.model_dependency: checkpoint instrumentation for readout-gene token attribution
candidate_signal_routes.name: gene_token_attribution_or_gradient
candidate_signal_routes.why_it_matches_the_task: It can test whether inside-model features align with a specific gene decision.

candidate_signal_routes.main_risk: It is not clean evidence that the LLM used SFM internals faithfully.
candidate_signal_routes.model_dependency: current panel signal plus existing baseline disagreement
candidate_signal_routes.name: panel_signal_plus_edge_baseline_fusion
candidate_signal_routes.why_it_matches_the_task: It tests whether edge-level formatting alone improves routing.

claim_boundary: Design gate only; no new LLM call, no full Phase 1B result, and no claim that scFoundation internals are used faithfully.

edge_reuse_feasibility.rationale: Neighbor-style edge signals are feasible when the same readout gene appears in other perturbation panels, allowing gene-specific support without using the target edge's hidden correctness label.

next_phase1b_pilot.llm_gate: run only after leakage checks and edge-signal validity diagnostics pass
next_phase1b_pilot.primary_pre_llm_metric: edge-level AUROC for GEARS wrongness versus current panel-card AUROC
next_phase1b_pilot.scope: reuse the 12 Phase 1A selected panels first

recommended_route.reason: The same readout gene usually appears in many other panels, so a nearest-neighbor, readout-gene-specific cue is feasible without using the target edge's hidden truth.
recommended_route.why_not_masked_prediction_first: The current scFoundation smoke path verified embeddings only; a gene-prediction path must be probed separately.

why_this_exists: Phase 1A showed that panel-level scFoundation cards are too coarse for edge-level verify/trust decisions.
